description:
## Component: hx-divider (NEW)
**Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 5/6 libraries**

Visual separator line for content sections. Horizontal or vertical.

### ADR-001 Classification: Property-Driven (Atomic)
Properties control orientation and styling. No slots needed.

### API Design
**Properties:** `orientation` (horizontal|vertical), `variant` (solid|dashed|dotted), `spacing` (sm|md|lg — margin), `role` (separator|presentation — ARIA)
**CSS Parts:** `divider`

### Drupal Integration
```twig
{# Section separator in patient record #}
<hx-divider spacing="lg"></hx-divider>

{# Vertical divider in button group or toolbar #}
<hx-divider orientation="vertical"></hx-divider>
```

### Acceptance Criteria
1. Horizontal and vertical orientations
2. Uses design tokens for color and spacing
3. ARIA role="separator" by default
4. Renders as `<hr>` semantically
5. Works inside flex/grid layouts
title: T1-23: hx-divider — Visual Separator

## Component: hx-divider (NEW)
**Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 5/6 libraries**

Visual separator line for content sections. Horizontal or vertical.

### ADR-001 Classification: Property-Driven (Atomic)
Properties control orientation and styling. No slots needed.

### API Design
**Properties:** `orientation` (horizontal|vertical), `variant` (solid|dashed|dotted), `spacing` (sm|md|lg — margin), `role` (separator|presentation — ARIA)
**CSS Parts:** `divider`

### Drupal Integration
```twig
{# Section separator in patient record #}
```

lastReviewFeedback:
coderabbitai: **Actionable comments posted: 3**

<details>
<summary>🤖 Prompt for all review comments with AI agents</summary>

```
Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

Inline comments:
In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-divider/hx-divider.styles.ts`:
- Around line 6-7: The CSS custom properties in hx-divider.styles.ts use
non-conforming names (--_color and --_thickness); rename them to use the
required --hx- prefix (e.g., --hx-divider-color and --hx-divider-thickness) and
update any references to these symbols in the file (and other files if
referenced) so the component uses the new variables consistently; ensure the
fallback chains still reference valid --hx-* tokens (for example replace
var(--_color, ...) with var(--hx-divider-color, var(--hx-color-neutral-200,
`#e5e7eb`)) and similarly for thickness).

In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-divider/hx-divider.test.ts`:
- Line 32: Replace all non-null assertions on shadowQuery results in the
hx-divider tests with proper type-narrowing assertions: call shadowQuery (e.g.,
shadowQuery(el, 'hr') ) without the trailing !, then assert the element exists
and its type using expect(...).toBeInstanceOf(...) or a custom helper; for
example replace usages like const hr = shadowQuery(el, 'hr')! with const hr =
shadowQuery(el, 'hr'); expect(hr).toBeInstanceOf(HTMLHRElement); and similarly
for other selectors — this preserves TypeScript null-safety for shadowQuery,
HTMLElement checks, and avoids non-null assertions across the tests.
```

</details>
